title: Expand bridge contract to preserve richer mlb_model recommendation payload
objective: Expand and preserve the model-issued bridge payload needed for truthful execution, monitoring, and later dashboard/debug fidelity without adding new strategy logic.
acceptance_criteria: bridge contract is explicitly richer than before
model-issued confidence/size/TP/SL fields are preserved end-to-end where present
no new strategy logic is added
rollback: Revert the narrow bridge payload expansion in core/model_bridge.py.
